name: Powerhouse Golf Club
about: Powerhouse Golf Club is a private, 24/7 indoor golf facility located in Jersey City, NJ. It operates on a members-only basis and features two fully automated Trackman bays equipped with Virtual Golf 3 software, which provides high-fidelity course simulations of famous venues like Bethpage Black. The club offers a range of services including lessons, club fittings, and organized leagues, all designed for a community-focused golf experience. Membership is required for access, and the venue emphasizes technology and convenience for players looking to improve their game or enjoy virtual rounds on iconic courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Membership-only community for exclusive and focused play
High-quality Virtual Golf 3 simulator software with realistic course simulations
Professional lessons and Mizuno club fittings available
Organized leagues and events for competitive play
